prompt.content: You have access to the invoices and subscriber_plans table. I want you to perform an analysis for invoices with billing period date starting in 2024 and for subscribers who applied the family, welcome, or upgrade promo codes. Then, find the medians of the total amount of paid and disputed invoices. Output the absolute difference between the two medians. Round the reported value to three decimal places. Please use only SQLite queries to complete this analysis. Include the full SQLite query used for the analysis as well as the requested results in the final output.

rubrics.name: Computes the absolute difference between the medians of the total amount of... (ver_5846233c7e8a406bb034cc8130efb3e4)

messages.content: Computes the absolute difference between the medians of the total amount of paid and disputed invoices as 76.190 (+/- 0.01).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
The absolute difference between the medians of the total amount of paid and disputed invoices is 76.190.

The SQL code for the analysis is as follows:
'''
WITH qualifying_subs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT subscriber_id
  FROM subscriber_plans
  WHERE promo_code_applied IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      lower(promo_code_applied) LIKE 'family%'
      OR lower(promo_code_applied) LIKE 'welcome%'
      OR lower(promo_code_applied) LIKE 'upgrade%'
    )
),
qualified_invoices AS (
  SELECT
    i.invoice_id,
    i.total_amount,
    lower(i.payment_status) AS status
  FROM invoices i
  JOIN qualifying_subs qs
    ON qs.subscriber_id = i.subscriber_id
  WHERE strftime('%Y', date(i.billing_period_start)) = '2024'
    AND lower(i.payment_status) IN ('paid', 'disputed')
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    status,
    total_amount,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY status ORDER BY total_amount) AS rn,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY status) AS cnt
  FROM qualified_invoices
),
medians AS (
  SELECT
    status,
    AVG(total_amount) AS median_amount
  FROM ranked
  WHERE rn IN ( (cnt + 1) / 2, (cnt + 2) / 2 )
  GROUP BY status
),
pivot AS (
  SELECT
    MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'paid' THEN median_amount END)     AS median_paid,
    MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'disputed' THEN median_amount END) AS median_disputed
  FROM medians
)
SELECT
  ROUND(ABS(median_paid - median_disputed), 3) AS abs_diff_medians
FROM pivot;
'''
